feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Transit in Toronto: Lessons in Land Use Planning

entry.title: Posted by: Chris Myers
entry.summary:
Fascinating article. Interesting statistics and helps to explain why I believe and also tell people whenever I travel to other countries that Toronto is a very livable city.
Chris Myers
entry.content:
Fascinating article. Interesting statistics and helps to explain why I believe and also tell people whenever I travel to other countries that Toronto is a very livable city.
Chris Myers
